title: ononis serrata var. baetica
intro: Ononis serrata var. baetica, also known as the Baetic spiny restharrow, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Ononis serrata var. baetica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and combat bacterial infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
